problem.title: Minimum Number of Arrows to Burst Ballons

approaches.title: Greedy interval overlap scanning
approaches.summary: Sort balloon intervals and greedily track the shared feasible endpoint to count the minimum arrows. Later revisions simplify the representation and sort by end,

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial greedy solution sorts by start, tracks the minimum overlap endpoint, and uses a sentinel interval to finalize​​.
Simplifies the same greedy scan by retaining the input vector, initializing the arrow count to one, and removing the||||

revisions.commitComment: remove need for min, by sorting by end
revisions.rawCommitSubject: rust 452: remove need for min, by sorting by end
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Refines the greedy strategy by sorting intervals by end, eliminating the running minimum-overlap calculation.
